debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)

failed_attempts:
(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · exact sSupIndep_pair hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · exact sSupIndep_pair'.mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair (fun heq => hx (disjoint_self.mp (heq ▸ hxy)))]
        exact h ▸ hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(by
      intro N hN'
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · exact sSupIndep_pair.mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair (fun h' => hx (disjoint_self.mp (h' ▸ hxy)))]
        exact h ▸ hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · exact sSupIndep_pair hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton N)

(by
      intro N hN'
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · exact sSupIndep_pair.mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(fun N hN' => by
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · exact sSupIndep_pair hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(by
      intro N hN'
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · exact sSupIndep_pair.mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(by
      intro N hN'
      simp only [B]
      split_ifs with h
      · exact sSupIndep_pair.mpr hxy
      · exact sSupIndep_singleton)

(fun N hN' => by

      split_ifs with h
      · rw [sSupIndep_pair (by rintro rfl; exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy))]
